headline: Chipotle Isn't Looking to Compete With McDonald's on Price, and Why That Could Be a Costly Mistake
summary: The company's growth rate has been falling drastically in recent years, and it might not improve anytime soon.

headline: Can CMG's High-Efficacy Kitchen Rollout Reignite Transactions in 2026?
summary: Chipotle is ramping up high-efficiency kitchens to cut prep time and boost throughput. Can the operational push reignite transactions in 2026?

headline: 1 Stock Under $50 on Our Watchlist and 2 We Ignore
summary: The $10-50 price range often includes mid-sized businesses with proven track records and plenty of growth runway ahead. They also usually carry less risk than penny stocks, though they’re not immune to volatility as many lack the scale advantages of their larger peers.

headline: 70% of single Americans would go on a first date at a fast-food restaurant—here's the most popular spot
summary: Chick-fil-A is the most popular fast-food restaurant for first dates. A psychology expert explains why a cheap romantic meal is becoming the newest dating trend.

headline: Chipotle Sets Recipe For Growth With 2026 Expansion And Digital Focus
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) has outlined its new "Recipe for Growth" strategy following its Q4 results. The company is targeting 350 to 370 new restaurant openings in 2026 as part of its expansion plans. Management highlighted strong digital sales as a key pillar supporting the growth framework. Chipotle Mexican Grill, trading at around $37.22 per share, is rolling out this plan at a time when its 1-year return sits at a 31.0% decline, while longer horizons show gains of 23.2% over 3...
